items.title: [P0] CEO: acquire Supabase service key + Spotify creds
items.why: #1 leverage per 2026-06-17 audit — SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY/DB_URL + SPOTIFY creds are EMPTY, blocking the real end-to-end pipeline run, media enrichment (HDUA-15) and HDUA-16 live verify. Code is ready; only credentials block the content goal.

items.title: [P0] Real agent-execution backend for /solve (replace simulator)
items.why: Replace the simulated buildSteps() orchestrator with real Claude agent invocation that produces a genuine evidence pack, so Solve can actually reach a verified MISSION_DONE.

items.title: [P0] Content API + HDCC→HDUA bridge
items.why: Stabilní read-API, které nativní HDUA app konzumuje, plněné eventy z HDCC pipeline.

items.title: [P0] App shell + spodní navigace
items.why: Skelet aplikace s Expo Router a spodní navigací Home / Search / Create / Alerts / Profile.

items.title: [P0] Aktivace enrichmentu — feed s reálnými médii
items.why: Naplnit feed reálnými daty (artist, cover, Spotify/YouTube) — teď je vizuálně prázdný.

items.title: [P1] PR-S4 — Consumer rewiring + Writer stage live — audit mise
items.why: Žádné direct from('sources') calls v app kódu — všechno přes SRL. Writer stage produkuje články s artist context. Backwards compat: legacy queries dál fungují přes view.

items.title: [P1] Provisionovat role + zpristrhnout createAdminClient (RBAC enforcement)
items.why: Navazuje na AUD-SEC-001. Auth je vynucena, ale RBAC je fail-open: ucty nemaji role claims, takze requireAdmin({role}) nic nevynuti. Navic createAdminClient (RLS bypass) se pouziva plosne.

items.title: [P1] Reconcile 7 SIMULATED_ONLY missions (truth gate)
items.why: 7 missions are fake-done (no evidence pack). Verify each against real evidence and promote or honestly re-park — do NOT blind-flip.
